name: CP/M 2.23 SoftCard BIOS (Z-80, $FA00-$FFFF)
description: Microsoft SoftCard CP/M 2.23 BIOS-internal labels. Companion to cpm_2_2.json (which holds the standard CP/M zero-page and BDOS conventions). These addresses are specific to the 2.23 build and don't apply to other CP/M variants. The BIOS base is $FA00 (jump table first); earlier revisions of this file used the wrong-address-model base $FAB8 and have been rebased by -$B8.

0xFA00.name: BOOT
0xFA00.comment: BIOS entry 0  -- cold-boot (jumps to NOP-slide landing $FED1)

0xFA03.name: WBOOT
0xFA03.comment: BIOS entry 1  -- warm boot (on SoftCard 2.23: jumps to $FAB8)

0xFA1B.name: SELDSK
0xFA1B.comment: BIOS entry 9  -- select disk (returns DPH pointer)

0xFA1E.name: SETTRK
0xFA1E.comment: BIOS entry 10 -- set track for next read/write

0xFA21.name: SETSEC
0xFA21.comment: BIOS entry 11 -- set sector for next read/write

0xFA24.name: SETDMA
0xFA24.comment: BIOS entry 12 -- set DMA buffer address

0xFA27.name: READ
0xFA27.comment: BIOS entry 13 -- read selected sector to DMA

0xFA2A.name: WRITE
0xFA2A.comment: BIOS entry 14 -- write DMA buffer to selected sector

0xFA2D.name: LISTST
0xFA2D.comment: BIOS entry 15 -- LIST status (inline XOR A; RET = not ready)

0xFA30.name: SECTRAN
0xFA30.comment: BIOS entry 16 -- sector translation (identity: LD H,B; LD L,C; RET)

0xFED4.name: BIOS_DMA
0xFED4.comment: Current DMA buffer address (set by SETDMA)

0xFD83.name: INIT_PASCAL_1_0
0xFD83.comment: Slot init for Pascal 1.0 firmware (device code 4)

0xFDB0.name: INIT_PASCAL_1_1
0xFDB0.comment: Slot init for Pascal 1.1 firmware -- device code 6, NEW IN 2.23 (the Videx fix)

0xFE81.name: INIT_KEYBOARD
0xFE81.comment: Slot init for keyboard / generic input (device code 3)

0xFB45.name: RPC_DISPATCH
0xFB45.comment: Console RPC dispatch into slot/$C800 firmware (former name BIOS_PRINT_C800 was an artifact of the pre-correction base)

0xFED1.name: BOOT_LANDING
0xFED1.comment: BOOT NOP-slide landing -- runtime-generated entry to device-scan

0xF3B8.name: SLOT_INFO_BASE
0xF3B8.comment: Slot-info table for cold-boot generator (F3B8+E = slot E's device code, E=1..7)

0x9C06.name: BDOS_ENTRY_223
0x9C06.comment: BDOS entry point -- planted at $0005-$0007 as JP $9C06

0x9C08.name: BDOS_SENTINEL
0x9C08.comment: First-boot vs warm-boot detect (initialized to $9C; $FB7F-$FB85 checks)
